topics.title: Introduction to React
topics.description: Learn what React is and why it is useful, including an overview of its core features and use cases.

topics.title: JSX Basics
topics.description: Understand how JSX works in React, including its syntax, rules, and how to incorporate it into components.

topics.title: State and Props
topics.description: Learn about state and props in React components and how they enable dynamic and reusable code.

topics.title: Component Lifecycle
topics.description: Explore the lifecycle methods in React and how they are used for managing component behavior.

topics.title: Handling Events
topics.description: Understand how to handle user interactions and events in React applications.
